title: Command Pattern Challenge

statement.markdown:
## Command Pattern
### Requirements numbered list
Implement the Command Pattern in TypeScript to encapsulate requests as objects.
Create a Invoker class that sends the requests to the Command object.
Create a Receiver class that receives and processes the requests.

constraints: Use TypeScript classes to implement the Command Pattern.
Use interfaces to define the Command and Receiver classes.
Implement a specific command to perform a specific action.

gradingCriteria.description: Encapsulates requests as objects using the Command pattern.
Creates an Invoker class that sends the requests to the Command object.
Creates a Receiver class that receives and processes the requests.
